list.vod_blurb: Bahri, a young man who lives in Mekarsari Village. One day, Bahri realized that something was wrong
list.vod_content: Bahri, a young man who lives in Mekarsari Village. One day, Bahri realized that something was wrong in Mekarsari Village. Out of curiosity, he also found out what was really going on in the village where he lived.
